info.description: Wallet Service API, providing account balance, transaction records, deposits, withdrawals and other functions
info.title: Wallet Service API

get.description: Query wallet list, supports filtering by status and pagination

post.description: Create a wallet for the specified user, supports specifying currency. Reference: GAAP/IFRS (Double-Entry Accounting Principles).
Batch freeze funds of multiple user wallets
Batch unfreeze multiple freeze records

get.description: Get coupon list

post.description: Create a new coupon

get.description: Get usage records of a specified coupon
Get anti-fraud rule list

post.description: Batch update anti-fraud rules

delete.description: Delete an anti-fraud rule by ID
Admin deletes a specified freeze record

get.description: Get reconciliation data for a specified tenant
Paginated query of all wallet snapshot records, sorted by snapshot date in descending order
Get wallet policy configuration for a specified application

put.description: Create or update wallet policy configuration for a specified application

delete.description: Delete policy configuration for a specified tenant and application

get.description: Get wallet balance summary for a specified application under a tenant
Get dispute list under a tenant

post.description: Process a specified dispute

get.description: Get aggregated statistics of all wallets under a tenant
Get balance summary of all wallets under a specified tenant
Get all transaction records under a tenant
Paginated query of webhook callback records, supports filtering by status
Get details of a single webhook callback record
User views their withdrawal application list

post.description: Approve a withdrawal application
Reject a withdrawal application
Admin manually adjusts user balance (requires audit)

get.description: Verify the integrity of the event hash chain for a specified wallet, detect tampering or data corruption
Query the current exchange rate between two currencies, generate a quote ID valid for 60 seconds

post.description: Execute currency exchange using a quote ID. Reference: GAAP/IFRS (Double-Entry Accounting Principles). The quote_id is valid for 60 seconds and becomes invalid after exchange to prevent replay.

get.description: Get runtime status information of the service

200.description: Runtime status (dynamic JSON, generated by health service)

get.description: Internal service call to query balance, returns available balance and frozen balance

post.description: Internal service call: erase all PII data of a specified user in the wallet service
Called by internal services such as identity-service, returns all wallet and transaction data of the user in wallet-service (for GDPR data portability)
Internal service call to refund, processes actuarial refund according to GAAP/IFRS double-entry accounting principles

get.description: Query wallet list, supports filtering by status and pagination

post.description: Create a wallet for the specified user, supports specifying currency. Reference: GAAP/IFRS (Double-Entry Accounting Principles).

get.description: Get coupon list

post.description: Create a new coupon

get.description: Query wallet balance snapshot for a specified date

post.description: Generate wallet balance snapshot
Cancel a specified transaction
Dispute a transaction
Transfer between users. Reference: GAAP/IFRS (Double-Entry Accounting Principles) to ensure debit-credit balance.

get.description: Get wallet details for a user, including balance, frozen amount, currency, and status.
Get wallet balance for a user.
Get audit trail of wallet balance changes for a user.
Get coupon list for a user.

post.description: Redeem a coupon using a coupon code.
Deposit to a user's wallet. Reference: GAAP/IFRS (Double-Entry Accounting Principles).

get.description: List disputes for the current user.

post.description: Freeze funds in a user's wallet.

get.description: Get freeze records for a user.

post.description: Refund to a user's wallet.

get.description: Get wallet statistics for a user.
Get transaction records for a user.

post.description: Unfreeze funds in a user's wallet.
Withdraw from a user's wallet. Reference: GAAP/IFRS (Double-Entry Accounting Principles).
Submit a withdrawal request.

get.description: List withdrawal requests for the current user.

timezone.description: Tenant timezone for daily limit calculation

dto.ReconciliationRecord.description: Reconciliation record for a single wallet

dto.SnapshotRequest.description: Request parameters for generating wallet balance snapshot

dto.TransactionDisputeRequest.description: Request parameters for disputing a wallet transaction

dto.UpdateFraudRulesRequest.description: Request parameters for batch updating fraud rule configurations

has_next.description: HasNext indicates whether there is a next page

has_prev.description: HasPrev indicates whether there is a previous page

page.description: Page is the current page number (1-based)

page_size.description: PageSize is the number of items per page

total.description: Total is the total number of items across all pages

total_pages.description: TotalPages is the total number of pages

bearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
bearerAuth.name: Authorization

tags.description: Wallet management: balance, transactions, deposits, withdrawals
tags.name: Wallet Service

tags.description: Wallet management admin: global configuration, fees, approvals
tags.name: Wallet Service - Admin
